## Description

Please describe what this pull request does and why. Include a reference to the relevant issue if applicable (e.g., "Closes #123").

## Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm the following:

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] This contribution was written by me. I have a full, independent understanding of every change proposed here and can explain and defend it.
- [ ] This pull request was **not** generated by an AI agent or automated tool. *(Using AI as a personal writing aid is acceptable, but the contribution must be authored and understood by a human.)*
- [ ] For non-trivial changes: I discussed this approach in an issue before opening this PR.
- [ ] The package passes `R CMD check` with no new errors or warnings.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests if the change affects package functionality.
- [ ] I have added or updated roxygen2 documentation if the change affects any exported functions.
